channel.title: CDSCO - cdscoDrugs (auto)
channel.description: Automated RSS for CDSCO cdscoDrugs page (generated).

item.title: RSS Feed Update Failed
item.description: Unable to fetch updates from CDSCO website. Error: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='cdscoonline.gov.in', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /CDSCO/cdscoDrugs (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='cdscoonline.gov.in', port=443) at 0x7f5b14cd98d0>, 'Connection to cdscoonline.gov.in timed out. (connect timeout=120)'))
